subtasks.description: Query spend data for Adobe and Microsoft products across 2024 quarters (Q1-Q4), compute quarter-over-quarter spend change for each product, then rank products within each publisher by Q4 spend

plan.cost_rationale: Single sql_gen subtask is sufficient: this is one multi-table query requiring joins across publishers and products, window functions (LAG for QoQ change calculation, RANK for product ranking), and aggregation by quarter. Mid tier is appropriate for the moderate complexity of CTEs with window functions and multiple aggregation levels. No cross-source reconciliation needed—this is single-source SQL warehouse analysis."

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "WITH quarterly_spend AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    fiscal_quarter,
    SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend
  FROM consumption_facts
  WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe', 'Microsoft')
    AND event_date >= '2024-01-01'
    AND event_date < '2025-01-01'
    AND fiscal_year = 2024
    AND fiscal_quarter IN (1, 2, 3, 4)
  GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q1_spend,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q2_spend,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q3_spend,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q4_spend
  FROM quarterly_spend
  GROUP BY publisher, product
),
with_qoq AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    q1_spend,
    q2_spend,
    q3_spend,
    q4_spend,
    (q2_spend - q1_spend) AS q1_to_q2_change,
    (q3_spend - q2_spend) AS q2_to_q3_change,
    (q4_spend - q3_spend) AS q3_to_q4_change,
    CASE WHEN q1_spend <> 0 THEN ROUND(((q2_spend - q1_spend) / q1_spend) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS q1_to_q2_pct_change,
    CASE WHEN q2_spend <> 0 THEN ROUND(((q3_spend - q2_spend) / q2_spend) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS q2_to_q3_pct_change,
    CASE WHEN q3_spend <> 0 THEN ROUND(((q4_spend - q3_spend) / q3_spend) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS q3_to_q4_pct_change,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY q4_spend DESC) AS q4_spend_rank_within_publisher
  FROM pivoted
)
SELECT
  publisher,
  product,
  q1_spend,
  q2_spend,
  q3_spend,
  q4_spend,
  q1_to_q2_change,
  q1_to_q2_pct_change,
  q2_to_q3_change,
  q2_to_q3_pct_change,
  q3_to_q4_change,
